001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.dao;
002
003import androidx.lifecycle.LiveData;
004import androidx.room.Dao;
005import androidx.room.Insert;
006import androidx.room.Query;
007import edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.model.entity.CandlingObservation;
008import java.util.List;
009
010/**
011 * Provides database access methods for {@link CandlingObservation} entities.
012 */
013@Dao
014public interface CandlingObservationDao {
015
016  /**
017   * Inserts a candling observation into the database.
018   *
019   * @param observation candling observation to insert.
020   * @return row ID of the inserted observation.
021   */
022  @Insert
023  long insert(CandlingObservation observation);
024
025  /**
026   * Returns all candling observations recorded for a specific egg.
027   *
028   * @param eggId ID of the egg.
029   * @return live list of observations for the specified egg, ordered by incubation day.
030   */
031  @Query("SELECT * FROM candling_observation WHERE egg_id = :eggId ORDER BY day_number ASC")
032  LiveData<List<CandlingObservation>> selectByEgg(long eggId);
033
034  /**
035   * Returns a single candling observation by ID.
036   *
037   * @param id observation ID.
038   * @return live observation matching the specified ID.
039   */
040  @Query("SELECT * FROM candling_observation WHERE observation_id = :id")
041  LiveData<CandlingObservation> select(long id);
042
043}
